Query
  Pipeline
    Stage extend
      Assign is_api
        Call if
          Call starts_with
            Ident path
            String "/api"
          String "yes"
          String "no"
      Assign is_v2
        Call if
          Call contains
            Ident path
            String "/v2/"
          String "yes"
          String "no"
    Stage stats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call count
      By
        Ident is_api
        Ident is_v2
    Stage sort
      SortKey +
        Ident is_api
      SortKey +
        Ident is_v2
